regression_check_against_loop_01_tests.command: loop-01's original test_parser.py run unmodified against loop-02's parser.py

stop_reason: Track plan called for exactly two Loops; loop-02 fixed the maintainability weakness identified in loop-01, added row/field context to error messages, expanded objective tests from 30 to 53 with zero regressions, and all blocking core samples and gates pass. Promoting to final/ as the Track champion.
notes: Refactored parse() into _Scanner + _Machine with per-state handlers; enriched ParseError with row/field context; promoted 12 loop-01 ad-hoc probes into committed tests and added 11 more. Verified no behavioral regression by re-running loop-01's original test file unmodified against loop-02's parser.py.
